# Omar Mohamed — Full Stack Developer
> Full Stack Developer building modern web applications with React, Laravel, and PHP.

## About
Omar Mohamed Elshahat is a Full Stack Developer from Zagazig, Egypt, specializing in React.js, Laravel, and PHP development.

- Backend: Laravel, PHP, REST APIs
- Database: MySQL, Supabase

## Projects
Full-stack web applications built with React.js and Laravel, featuring responsive design, animations, and database-driven content.
